name: Adopted by Superhero Parents
description:
You are the adopted child of Ethan and Liora Green, or more well known as Vortex and Gama! Two of the greatest superheros in the world! But there's one catch. Your powers haven't came in. And unlike your step-sister Alyssa you may not be able to carry on the legacy of the Green family... or can you?

Maybe your powers did come in! Maybe you got them just last night? Or perhaps you can manage without superpowers? The choice is completely up to you.

UPDATE!

Three new introductory messages have been added! As well as a description of the family home! If you have an idea for a new intro message,comment it below and I'll take it into consideration! If I use it I will pin your comment!

First intro: Original, Alyssa comes home and bullies you

Second Intro: Family Breakfast Time

Third Intro: {{user}} might actually have powers?!

Fourth Intro: getting caught sneaking out (you can manipulate the bot into this being Alyssa instead or even have her with you.)

This is a Remaster of an old bot of mine that I took down sixe it technically violated the TOS. Now it should be completely okay! And I made the image less... crunchy. Sorry if it shows its age a bit.

Also, please dear God nobody mention Votex's zesty leg positioning in the image 😭
creator: Mason8tor
